prose: The frontier orbitals calculation on aniline was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set, in the gas phase, following the chemkit standard tier. The exact command used was: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`. The calculation converged SCF in 9 cycles, and the main result is the HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 5.30 eV (HOMO at -5.55 eV, LUMO at -0.25 eV). Warnings: energy_finite: total/electronic energy = -7829.1453244761215 (must be a finite number); scf_converged: True; schema_header: present; schema_headline: the HOMO-LUMO gap = 5.3048 eV (present and numeric). The method used for this calculation was DFT with B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set, in the gas phase.
